subject: Hydreigon, a large black three-headed dragon with red wings and serpentine secondary heads, depicted in a dark aerial composition
description: A massive black dragon fills the frame, its primary head forward-facing with red and dark detailing on the face. Two additional serpentine heads extend from the body, their forms curling in the composition. Large red and black wings spread behind the creature, giving it an imposing wingspan silhouette. The background is dark and atmospheric, suggesting a night sky or storm — consistent with the creature's Darkness typing. The overall palette is dominated by deep blacks, dark reds, and muted blues, creating a menacing, gothic atmosphere. The flavor text notes villages destroyed by this creature, and the art captures that sense of destructive power.
foreground: Large black three-headed dragon, primary head forward, red wings spread, serpentine secondary heads visible
emotion: Predatory, dominating — multiple heads imply relentless hunger; body language is all offense, no defense
